parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While On, this node will cache a single snapshot of it's input's geometry each cook.

parameters.name: prefill
parameters.label: Pre-Fill
parameters.description: Cooks 'Cache Size' number of times to fill the Cache with geometry. When set > 0, it will fill the cache. If set > 0 during playback, it will fill immediately. If set > 0 and saved out, then next time

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: The number of frames that the node will cook before it caches another geometry. When set to 1, it will cache every cook, when set to 2, it will cache every two cooks, etc.

parameters.name: outputindex
parameters.label: Output Index
parameters.description: Determines which cached geometry to output. 0 is the most recent cached geometry. Valid values are between 0 and cachesize - 1.

parameters.name: cachepoints
parameters.label: Cache Points Only
parameters.description: Store a single topology for the first cached geometry and only point data for the remaining geometries.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: When On, clears out all of the cached geometry.
